home.heroSubtitle: Who are you? Are you compatible? Which direction should you take?
home.examples.title: See what you'll discover
home.examples.desc: Three real types — each with its element profile, identity, and a one-line portrait.
home.cta: Start free assessment, discover your precise type →
home.guarantee: 25 questions. A few minutes. No account required.
home.riverDesc: Watch how your elemental proportions shift across five solar months. The current month is marked.
home.peerDesc: How you see yourself, and how others see you. The same person through two different lenses.
home.flowDesc: Every solar month tilts your five-element balance in a different direction. See the seasonal shift.
home.chordDesc: Two profiles, their five-element strengths, and the generating and restraining effects when they meet.
home.chordCta: Your relationships are computable. Find your Bond →

footer.tagline: Find your true type. A five-element framework.
types.title: 25 Personality Types
types.subtitle: Pure elements and their composites. Each is a direction, not a box.
types.graphDesc: Primary element (rows) × Secondary element (columns). Pure types on the diagonal.
types.cta.text: Not sure where to start? Take the assessment to find your type.
types.detail.interactionsDesc: Your element interacts differently with each of the five pure types.
types.detail.cta.text: Want to find your own type? Take the assessment in a few minutes.

bond.title: Bond Dynamics
bond.subtitle: How your five elements interact — generating and restraining effects between two profiles.
bond.concordShunDesc: Mutual nourishment — your elements naturally support each other.
bond.concordNiDesc: Mutual restraint — your elements create productive tension.
bond.concordPingDesc: Balanced — generating and restraining forces are even.

flow.explanation: Seasonal energy shifts your elemental balance.

profile.yourTypeDesc: Your five-element identity — a unique shape, not a box.

bondGallery.title: Bond Gallery
bondGallery.aboutTitle: Bond is how your elements interact with someone else's.
bondGallery.aboutDesc: Not a compatibility score — a computable map of generating (sheng) and restraining (ke) effects. Two profiles meet, and the algebra shows the direction and strength of energy flow between them.
bondGallery.loginRequired: Log in to view your bonds.
bondGallery.noBondsHint: Create a match link or compare with someone to populate your bond gallery.

donate.subtitle: Choose an amount to donate. Your support helps us keep 25types free and open to everyone.

donate.thankYouNote: Every donation, no matter the amount, makes a difference. Thank you for your support!
donate.thankYouDesc: Your donation helps keep 25types free and open to everyone.

settings.publicProfileDesc: Your name, element profile, and assessment results will be visible to everyone. Bonds and flow data remain private.

settings.deleteModalConfirm: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
